overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a hooded character in ancient Egyptian robes walking through a sunlit desert city. The character navigates from a temple courtyard past a smoking stone monument, through streets with NPCs, and approaches an ornate temple gate adorned with hieroglyphics and sphinx statues.

scene_state.functional_zone: open temple courtyard with main sanctuary ahead

events.description: character turns right away from the main temple structure to follow a side path

agents.ego_description: walking through the courtyard then turning right to follow a sandy path alongside the temple

entered.detail: large sandstone temple structure with columns and hieroglyphic details
cluster of palm trees surrounding the temple complex
small mud-brick structure with wooden details
green shrubs with red flowers lining the path

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a sunlit temple courtyard facing a large main temple complex. Palm trees frame the scene on both sides. After walking forward, the character turns right at approximately 13 seconds to follow a side path, revealing a smoking stone monument in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy street approaching a distant city gate with stone monument

agents.ego_description: walking steadily past the smoking stone monument toward the distant temple gate

entered.detail: tall cylindrical stone structure emitting smoke from the top
large stone archway marking the temple entrance visible in the distance
tall mud-brick defensive wall running along the right side
stacked clay urns and bowls beside the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sandy path past a smoking stone monument. The temple entrance gate is visible in the distance ahead, while adobe walls line the right side. The main temple complex from the previous area is now behind and to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy street with children playing near the temple gate

events.description: child runs past the camera from right to left, temporarily blocking the view

agents.ego_description: walking through the street as a child runs past and other NPCs move about the area

notable_agents.action: child runs quickly past the character from right to left

entered.detail: young child in simple linen clothing running through the street
small structure with crenellations along the wall

segments.scene_description: The character continues toward the temple gate through a more populated area. A child runs past closely from right to left around the 33-second mark. The temple entrance gate grows larger in the frame as the character approaches, and other NPCs are visible walking in the area.

scene_state.functional_zone: ornate temple entrance with hieroglyphic carvings and sphinx guardians

events.description: approaching the detailed temple gate revealing hieroglyphics and sphinx statues

agents.ego_description: walking toward the temple entrance preparing to enter through the gate

notable_agents.action: temple visitor walking ahead through the gate entrance

entered.detail: detailed Egyptian carvings covering the gate pillars showing figures and symbols
large stone sphinx statue guarding the left side of the entrance
large stone sphinx statue guarding the right side of the entrance
bronze lamp hanging from the top of the gate archway

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the ornate temple entrance, revealing detailed hieroglyphic carvings and massive sphinx statues flanking the gate. The architecture shows intricate Egyptian designs and painted reliefs. Other visitors are seen entering the temple ahead as the character moves toward the threshold.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet temple courtyard into the bustling approach of a grand Egyptian gateway. It begins facing a large temple complex framed by palm trees, before the character turns right to follow a sandy side path that reveals a smoking stone monument in the distance. As the camera moves past adobe walls, the scene opens into a more populated area where NPCs wander and a child runs across the path. The perspective then shifts toward the looming temple entrance, which grows larger in the frame as the character advances. Finally, the shot culminates at the ornate gate, revealing detailed hieroglyphic carvings and massive sphinx statues flanking the threshold as other visitors enter the temple.
